title: Companies (Inspection and Preferential Debts) (Monetary Limits) Regulations, 2004
title_en: Companies (Inspection and Preferential Debts) (Monetary Limits) Regulations, 2004

provisions.title: Citation commencement and interpretation
provisions.content: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Companies (Inspection and Preferential Debts) (Monetary Limits) Regulation, 2004, and shall come into force on such date as the Minister may by notice in the Gazette , appoint. (2) In these Regulations “the Act” means the Companies Act, 2002. [Act No. 12 of 2002 ]

provisions.title: Sum to which priority is given
provisions.content: Pursuant to section 367(3) of the Act, the sum to which priority is Sum to to be given under section 367(2)(c) shall not exceed four thousand shillings.
